features.name: Project Verification Baseline

make test succeeds

make app builds Go binaries from source
make app bundles correct runtime artifacts
App launches and calls mo commands successfully

subTasks.name: Full build + launch verify
subTasks.evidence: make app + app launches, runtime version 1.40.0

features.evidence: make app passes. Go binaries built native arm64. App launches, calls /Applications/MoleMac.app/Contents/Resources/MoleRuntime/mo. Version: 1.40.0

features.name: Permissions / Full Disk Access Finish
features.description: Finish the existing Permissions feature by surfacing the Analyze preflight banner and refreshing tracking artifacts. FDA probe intentionally left unchanged pending controller runtime verification.
doneCriteria: AnalyzeView shows the same PreflightBanner pattern as CleanView and OptimizeView
ContentView passes the shared PermissionsService into AnalyzeView
feature_list.json and session-handoff.md reflect the Permissions feature state
swift build passes
Controller runtime-verified the Analyze preflight banner renders (screenshot); FDA not-granted branch deferred to a documented manual check

subTasks.name: Add Analyze preflight banner
subTasks.evidence: Sources/Views/AnalyzeView.swift adds @ObservedObject permissions and PreflightBanner(item: .analyze, permissions: permissions). Sources/ContentView.swift passes permissions into AnalyzeView.

subTasks.name: FDA probe not-granted branch
subTasks.evidence: Cannot be exercised from an FDA-enabled environment (probe reads Granted). Documented as a manual check in session-handoff.md: revoke Full Disk Access for MoleMac, relaunch, expect Permissions card + preflight banners to read 'Not granted'. If still 'Granted', repoint probe from ~/Library/.../TCC.db to /Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db. PermissionsService.probeFullDiskAccess intentionally unchanged until that check runs.

subTasks.name: Refresh tracking artifacts
subTasks.evidence: feature_list.json entry added; session-handoff.md refreshed for feat-008.

features.evidence: Scope: Analyze banner wiring + tracking only (4 files; no Status files or PermissionsService touched). swift build passes. Controller runtime-verified: Analyze tab renders the PreflightBanner showing 'Full Disk Access', no crash. Pre-existing analyze-data decode error observed (unrelated to this feature; reported separately). FDA not-granted branch is a documented manual check (see session-handoff.md).

features.name: Rename App to Drilbur
features.description: Rename the SwiftUI GUI shell from MoleMac to Drilbur (Pokemon-inspired, personal use). GUI identity only: app bundle, executable, bundle ID, env vars, user-visible strings, and docs. The upstream Mole CLI (mo, MoleRuntime/ path, Vendor/Mole submodule) keeps its name and is NOT renamed.
doneCriteria: Package.swift product/target renamed MoleMac -> Drilbur; Sources/MoleMacApp.swift -> Sources/DrilburApp.swift; struct MoleMacApp -> DrilburApp
build_app.sh: APP_NAME/executable -> Drilbur, BUNDLE_ID com.mole.molemac -> co.greenpassport.drilbur, Info.plist CFBundleName/CFBundleExecutable/CFBundleIdentifier updated
Env vars MOLEMAC_SCREEN/MOLEMAC_MO_PATH -> DRILBUR_SCREEN/DRILBUR_MO_PATH in ContentView.swift and MoService.swift
User-visible strings (PermissionsView.swift, Permission.swift osascript admin prompt, window title) say Drilbur
Docs updated: README.md, CLAUDE.md, Makefile, init.sh, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, plans/*.md
Vendor/Mole, mo, and Contents/Resources/MoleRuntime/ left unchanged
make app builds; child binaries re-verified to share the new bundle ID signature domain
Launch verified: window title + osascript admin prompt show 'Drilbur'; DRILBUR_SCREEN=clean .../MacOS/Drilbur deep-links to the Clean tab

subTasks.name: Rename Package.swift product/target + MoleMacApp.swift/struct
subTasks.evidence: Package name/product/target -> Drilbur; git mv Sources/MoleMacApp.swift -> Sources/DrilburApp.swift; struct DrilburApp.

subTasks.name: Update build_app.sh APP_NAME/BUNDLE_ID/Info.plist + re-verify signature inheritance
subTasks.evidence: APP=Drilbur.app, BUNDLE_ID=co.greenpassport.drilbur, CFBundleName/Executable/Identifier=Drilbur, git mv MoleMac.entitlements -> Drilbur.entitlements (+ ref). codesign --verify --deep --strict: 'valid on disk' + 'satisfies its Designated Requirement'.

subTasks.name: Rename MOLEMAC_* env vars in ContentView + MoService
subTasks.evidence: DRILBUR_SCREEN (ContentView), DRILBUR_MO_PATH (MoService); temp-log names molemac-* -> drilbur-*.

subTasks.name: Update user-visible strings (PermissionsView, admin prompt, title)
subTasks.evidence: Permission.swift + PermissionsView.swift say Drilbur; sidebar brand Text("Mole") -> Text("Drilbur") (kept 'Powered by bundled Mole'); osascript prompt derives name from CFBundleName (no hardcoded string, advisor-confirmed).

subTasks.name: Update docs + trackers
subTasks.evidence: README, Makefile, init.sh, CLAUDE.md, progress.md, session-handoff.md, plans/*.md renamed; MoleRuntime/Vendor/Mole left intact.

subTasks.name: make app + launch verify (title, admin prompt, deep-link)
subTasks.evidence: make app OK. Launch (DRILBUR_SCREEN=clean direct-exec): process alive, no crash, AppleScript window title = 'Drilbur', menu bar 'Drilbur', sidebar 'Drilbur', deep-linked to Clean (screenshots /tmp/drilbur-clean2.png). Old /Applications/MoleMac.app removed first.

features.evidence: Renamed GUI shell MoleMac -> Drilbur (bundle id co.greenpassport.drilbur). grep confirms zero MoleMac/MOLEMAC/old-bundle-id residue (excl Vendor/.git/.build); MoleRuntime path intact. swift build + make app pass; signature valid + satisfies Designated Requirement. Runtime-verified: window title, menu bar, sidebar all show 'Drilbur', deep-link works, no crash. Mole CLI/runtime untouched.

features.name: Commit Analyze Decode Fix
features.description: Commit the working-tree fix for the Analyze 'data couldn't be read' decode error: mo analyze omits is_dir for large_files entries, so DiskEntry.isDir was made optional with a ?? false fallback in the view.
doneCriteria: Sources/Models/SystemStatus.swift DiskEntry.isDir is Bool? (optional)
Sources/Views/AnalyzeView.swift uses (entry.isDir ?? false)
make app; Analyze tab renders the large-files list with no decode error
Committed as a single commit

subTasks.name: Runtime-verify Analyze tab decodes + renders
subTasks.evidence: Root cause confirmed against real mo 1.40.0 output: analyze --json entries[] carry is_dir but large_files[] omit it (sample keys ['name','path','size']), so non-optional isDir failed to decode the large-files list. Optional fix decodes both.

features.evidence: DiskEntry.isDir made Bool? (SystemStatus.swift); AnalyzeView uses (entry.isDir ?? false). Root cause verified: large_files[] omit is_dir while entries[] include it. swift build passes. Committed on branch feat/drilbur-and-next-tasks.

features.name: Parser-Resilience Regression Harness
features.description: Guard the fragile human-readable-text parsers and literal-string matches that silently return empty results if Mole's output format changes: parseCleanPreview, parsePurgePreview, parseOptimizePreview, and the literal 'System-level cleanup skipped, requires sudo' match. Capture real mo output as golden fixtures and add a parser test that fails on format drift.
doneCriteria: Golden-output fixtures captured from real mo (clean preview clean-list.txt, purge, optimize) on Mole 1.40.0
A parser test feeds the fixtures through the parsers and asserts the expected non-empty structured results
Test asserts the 'System-level cleanup skipped, requires sudo' detection still matches
Mutating a glyph marker (===, the box rule, the arrow) or the skip string in a fixture makes the test fail
Test runs via make test (or a documented command if a test target must be added)

subTasks.name: Verify drift (mutated fixture) fails the test

If still 'Granted', PermissionsService.probeFullDiskAccess repointed from ~/Library/.../TCC.db to /Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db and re-verified
feat-008 FDA subTask flipped from manual-check to done with evidence
session-handoff.md manual-check note resolved

subTasks.name: Revoke FDA, relaunch, observe Permissions card + banners

features.name: Consistent Error-State UX
features.description: Replace raw/cryptic failure text with one reusable error+retry state shared across tabs (friendly message + Retry button) for failed mo calls and decode errors. A natural home for a small Drilbur mascot presence.
doneCriteria: A reusable error-state view (message + Retry) exists and is wired into the tabs that shell out to mo
Retry re-runs the failed operation
Forcing a failure (bad DRILBUR_MO_PATH) shows the error card instead of raw text, and Retry works after the path is fixed
Follows DesignTokens (no hardcoded colors); make app passes
Runtime-verified via screenshot
